categories.name: Compute
categories.description: Services for computing, hosting, and running applications and workloads

services.name: Azure Virtual Machines
services.description: Scalable on-demand computing resources with support for Windows and Linux VMs for running applications and workloads in the cloud.

services.name: Azure App Service
services.description: Fully managed PaaS for building web applications, mobile backends, and RESTful APIs with support for .NET, Java, Node.js, Python, and PHP.

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Serverless event-driven compute service for running code on-demand without managing infrastructure, with automatic scaling.

services.name: Azure Kubernetes Service
services.description: Managed Kubernetes service for deploying, managing, and scaling containerized applications with production-ready features.

services.name: Azure Container Apps
services.description: Serverless container hosting platform for running containerized applications without managing Kubernetes or infrastructure.

services.name: Azure Container Instances
services.description: Fastest and simplest way to run containers in Azure without managing virtual machines or adopting a higher-level service.

services.name: Azure Spring Apps
services.description: Managed service for Spring Boot applications offering enterprise-grade reliability with minimal configuration.

services.name: Azure Batch
services.description: Cloud-native job scheduling and compute resource management service for running large-scale parallel workloads.

services.name: Azure Static Web Apps
services.description: Modern web app hosting service for static sites and serverless applications with integrated CI/CD from GitHub.

services.name: Azure Service Fabric
services.description: Distributed systems platform for deploying, managing, and scaling microservices and containers with high availability.

services.name: Azure Dedicated Hosts
services.description: Physical servers dedicated to a single Azure subscription, providing hardware isolation and control over VM placement for compliance and licensing needs.

services.name: Azure Virtual Desktop
services.description: Cloud-based desktop and app virtualization service that runs on Azure, delivering full Windows desktops and apps to any device.

services.name: Azure CycleCloud
services.description: HPC cluster orchestration and management tool that provisions, manages, and scales high-performance computing environments on Azure.

categories.name: Storage
categories.description: Services for storing data including blobs, files, disks, and managed storage

services.name: Azure Blob Storage
services.description: Highly scalable cloud object storage solution optimized for storing massive amounts of unstructured data.

services.name: Azure Files
services.description: Managed file shares in the cloud accessible via SMB protocol for hybrid on-premises and cloud workloads.

services.name: Azure Disk Storage
services.description: High-performance block storage for Azure virtual machines with options for standard and premium storage.

services.name: Azure Data Lake Storage
services.description: Massively scalable and cost-effective data lake solution for big data analytics built on Blob Storage.

services.name: Azure NetApp Files
services.description: Enterprise-grade file storage service for on-premises and cloud workloads with high performance and compliance.

services.name: Azure Managed Disks
services.description: Block-level storage volumes managed by Azure for use with virtual machines, offering high availability and durable disk storage with multiple performance tiers.

services.name: Azure Ultra Disk Storage
services.description: Highest-performance Azure disk storage tier offering sub-millisecond latency and high IOPS for mission-critical, IO-intensive workloads like SAP HANA and top-tier databases.

services.name: Azure HPC Cache
services.description: NFS file caching service that accelerates access to on-premises or Azure Blob Storage data for high-performance computing workloads, reducing latency and improving throughput.

categories.name: Databases
categories.description: Managed database services including SQL, NoSQL, and in-memory caching

services.name: Azure SQL Database
services.description: Fully managed relational database with built-in intelligence, security, and elastic scaling using SQL Server engine.

services.name: Azure SQL Managed Instance
services.description: SQL Server database engine instance hosted in Azure with near 100% compatibility for on-premises SQL Server.

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Fully managed NoSQL, relational, and vector database with global distribution, multi-API support, and guaranteed low latency.

services.name: Azure Database for PostgreSQL
services.description: Managed open-source PostgreSQL database service with flexible deployment options and built-in availability.

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Fully managed in-memory data cache for improving application performance with Redis compatibility.

services.name: Azure Database for MySQL
services.description: Fully managed, scalable MySQL relational database service with built-in high availability, automated backups, and security, powered by the MySQL community edition.

services.name: Azure Database for MariaDB
services.description: Fully managed relational database service based on the open-source MariaDB engine, offering high availability, automated backups, and enterprise-grade security.

services.name: Azure Table Storage
services.description: NoSQL key-value store for storing large amounts of semi-structured data, offering schemaless design, massive scale, and low-cost data access.

categories.name: Networking
categories.description: Services for connecting, managing, and securing network infrastructure

services.name: Azure Virtual Network
services.description: Foundational networking service for creating isolated networks with subnets, routing, and security controls.

services.name: Azure Load Balancer
services.description: High-performance load balancing service for distributing network traffic across multiple backends at L4 and L7.

services.name: Azure Application Gateway
services.description: Layer 7 web traffic load balancer providing application-level routing, SSL termination, and WAF capabilities.

services.name: Azure Front Door
services.description: Global, scalable entry point for applications providing DDoS protection, SSL termination, and geo-routing.

services.name: Azure CDN
services.description: Content delivery network service for caching and delivering content globally with low latency.

services.name: Azure ExpressRoute
services.description: Dedicated private network connection between on-premises networks and Azure with consistent bandwidth.

services.name: Azure VPN Gateway
services.description: Encrypted site-to-site and point-to-site VPN connectivity for secure hybrid cloud networking.

services.name: Azure Firewall
services.description: Fully managed, stateful network firewall as a service with built-in high availability and threat intelligence.

services.name: Azure DNS
services.description: Domain Name System hosting service providing name resolution with high availability and global reach.

services.name: Azure Bastion
services.description: Fully managed service for secure RDP/SSH access to virtual machines without exposing public IP addresses.

services.name: Azure Traffic Manager
services.description: DNS-based traffic router for distributing user traffic across global endpoints for high availability.

services.name: Azure Private Link
services.description: Enables private connectivity to Azure services and customer-owned services over Azure backbone network.

services.name: Azure DDoS Protection
services.description: Service protecting applications from distributed denial-of-service attacks with adaptive mitigation.

services.name: Azure Virtual WAN
services.description: Managed networking service that unifies networking, security, and routing into a single operational hub, providing optimized branch-to-Azure and branch-to-branch connectivity.

services.name: Azure Route Server
services.description: Managed service that enables dynamic route exchange between network virtual appliances (NVAs) and your Azure virtual network using BGP, simplifying network routing management.

services.name: Azure NAT Gateway
services.description: Fully managed outbound connectivity service for Azure virtual network subnets, providing scalable and resilient SNAT without the complexity of managing network rules.

services.name: Azure Network Watcher
services.description: Regional monitoring, diagnostic, and analytics service for Azure virtual network resources, providing tools like connection troubleshoot, packet capture, and flow logs.

services.name: Azure Peering Service
services.description: Connectivity service that enhances customer connections to Microsoft cloud services, providing optimized and reliable routing from internet service providers to Microsoft.

services.name: Azure Web Application Firewall
services.description: Cloud-native WAF providing centralized protection of web applications from common exploits and vulnerabilities such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting.

categories.name: Integration
categories.description: Services for connecting and integrating applications and data

services.name: Azure Service Bus
services.description: Reliable cloud messaging service for asynchronous communication between applications with queues and topics.

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.description: Highly scalable event ingestion service for capturing millions of events per second from applications and devices.

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Event routing service for connecting event sources to event handlers in near real-time.

services.name: Azure Logic Apps
services.description: Serverless integration platform for automating workflows and business processes across cloud and on-premises.

services.name: Azure API Management
services.description: Fully managed service for publishing APIs securely to developers, partners, and customers at scale.

services.name: Azure SignalR Service
services.description: Fully managed service for adding real-time communication capabilities to web applications using WebSocket.

services.name: Azure Notification Hubs
services.description: Push notification service for sending targeted notifications across multiple platforms at scale.

categories.name: Analytics
categories.description: Services for big data analytics, data warehousing, and business intelligence

services.name: Azure Synapse Analytics
services.description: Unified analytics service combining big data and data warehousing with on-demand or provisioned resources.

services.name: Azure Data Factory
services.description: Cloud ETL service for scale-out serverless data integration and transformation using visual authoring.

services.name: Azure Stream Analytics
services.description: Real-time analytics service for processing streaming data from multiple sources with SQL-like queries.

services.name: Azure Databricks
services.description: Unified analytics platform for data engineering and machine learning using Apache Spark.

services.name: Azure Analysis Services
services.description: Managed PaaS service for enterprise-grade semantic data modeling with support for tabular models.

services.name: Microsoft Purview
services.description: Unified data governance solution for managing data across on-premises, multi-cloud, and SaaS environments.

services.name: Azure HDInsight
services.description: Fully managed cloud service for open-source analytics that makes it easy to process massive amounts of data using popular frameworks like Hadoop, Spark, Hive, and Kafka.

services.name: Azure Data Explorer
services.description: Fast, fully managed big data analytics platform optimized for near real-time analysis of large volumes of streaming telemetry, logs, and time series data using the Kusto Query Language.

services.name: Azure Time Series Insights
services.description: End-to-end platform-as-a-service for ingesting, storing, and querying highly contextualized, time-series-optimized IoT data, with built-in visualization tools.

services.name: Power BI Embedded
services.description: Azure analytics service for embedding fully interactive Power BI reports, dashboards, and data visualizations into custom applications without requiring a Power BI subscription.

categories.name: AI and Machine Learning
categories.description: Services for building, training, and deploying AI and machine learning models

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.description: Unified platform for building, training, and deploying machine learning models with enterprise governance.

services.name: Azure OpenAI Service
services.description: Access to OpenAI's latest models including GPT-4, DALL-E, and Whisper with enterprise security and compliance.

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: AI-powered cloud search service for extracting information and enhancing search over private data.

services.name: Microsoft Foundry
services.description: Unified platform for enterprise AI operations combining model deployment, governance, and application development.

services.name: Azure Cognitive Services
services.description: Umbrella suite of AI APIs and services for vision, speech, language, and decision intelligence, enabling developers to add AI capabilities without machine learning expertise.

services.name: Azure Bot Service
services.description: Integrated development environment for building, testing, and deploying intelligent bots that interact naturally with users over multiple channels including Teams, Slack, and web chat.

services.name: Azure Language Service
services.description: Managed NLP service offering pre-built and customizable features including sentiment analysis, key phrase extraction, named entity recognition, and conversational language understanding.

services.name: Azure Translator
services.description: Cloud-based neural machine translation service supporting 100+ languages and dialects for real-time multilingual text and document translation.

services.name: Azure Speech Service
services.description: Unified speech API providing speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speech translation, and speaker recognition capabilities with support for 100+ languages.

services.name: Azure Computer Vision
services.description: AI service for extracting information from images and video, including optical character recognition (OCR), object detection, scene analysis, and image captioning.

services.name: Azure Form Recognizer
services.description: AI document processing service (now Azure AI Document Intelligence) that extracts text, tables, key-value pairs, and structure from documents using pre-built and custom models.

services.name: Azure Video Indexer
services.description: AI video and audio analysis service that automatically extracts insights such as transcripts, faces, topics, brands, and shot detection from media files.

services.name: Azure Personalizer
services.description: AI service using reinforcement learning to select the best content action for each user in real time, optimizing for business outcomes defined by custom reward signals.

services.name: Azure Anomaly Detector
services.description: AI service that automatically detects anomalies in univariate and multivariate time series data, requiring no machine learning knowledge to deploy.

services.name: Azure Metrics Advisor
services.description: AI-powered monitoring service for multivariate time series data that automatically detects issues, diagnoses root causes, and provides customizable alert configurations.

services.name: Azure Content Moderator
services.description: AI service for detecting potentially offensive, harmful, or undesirable content in text, images, and video to support human review workflows and policy enforcement.

services.name: Azure Immersive Reader
services.description: Accessibility tool that implements proven techniques to improve reading comprehension for emerging readers, language learners, and people with learning differences like dyslexia.

categories.name: Security
categories.description: Services for securing applications, data, and infrastructure

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Cloud-based identity and access management service (formerly Azure AD) for user authentication and authorization.

services.name: Azure Key Vault
services.description: Secure storage for cryptographic keys, secrets, and certificates with access logging and role-based controls.

services.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
services.description: Unified security management and threat protection service for hybrid and multi-cloud workloads.

services.name: Microsoft Sentinel
services.description: Cloud-native SIEM service for detecting, investigating, and responding to threats at scale.

services.name: Microsoft Entra External ID
services.description: External identity solution for managing and securing customer and partner identities, supporting social logins and custom authentication flows for external-facing applications.

services.name: Microsoft Entra Verified ID
services.description: Decentralized identity service for issuing and verifying digital credentials based on open standards, enabling privacy-respecting identity verification workflows.

services.name: Azure Managed HSM
services.description: Fully managed, highly available, single-tenant cloud HSM service for safeguarding cryptographic keys using FIPS 140-2 Level 3 validated hardware security modules.

services.name: Azure Dedicated HSM
services.description: Single-tenant physical HSM devices hosted in Azure datacenters, giving customers exclusive and direct access to FIPS 140-2 Level 3 hardware for cryptographic operations.

services.name: Azure Confidential Computing
services.description: Protects data in use by performing computations inside hardware-based Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), isolating sensitive data from the cloud provider and OS.

services.name: Azure Lighthouse
services.description: Cross-tenant management platform enabling service providers and enterprise IT teams to manage multiple customer Azure environments at scale from a single pane of glass.

services.name: Azure Payment HSM
services.description: Single-tenant, bare-metal HSM service for payment transaction processing, meeting PCI DSS and PCI PIN requirements for financial institutions.

categories.name: Management and Monitoring
categories.description: Services for managing, monitoring, and optimizing Azure resources

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Comprehensive monitoring solution for collecting, analyzing, and acting on metrics, logs, and traces.

services.name: Application Insights
services.description: Application performance management service for monitoring live web applications with dependency tracking.

services.name: Azure DevOps
services.description: Unified DevOps platform for planning, building, testing, and deploying with CI/CD, version control, and testing.

services.name: Azure Policy
services.description: Service for creating and enforcing policies to maintain compliance and governance across Azure resources.

services.name: Azure Advisor
services.description: Personalized recommendation engine for optimizing Azure deployments across reliability, performance, and costs.

services.name: Azure Resource Manager
services.description: Management layer for provisioning, managing, and organizing Azure resources using templates and policies.

services.name: Azure Managed Grafana
services.description: Fully managed Grafana service for visualization and monitoring of metrics and logs at scale.

services.name: Azure Log Analytics
services.description: Log management and query tool within Azure Monitor for collecting, indexing, and analyzing log and performance data from cloud and on-premises resources using the Kusto Query Language.

services.name: Azure Cost Management
services.description: Service for monitoring, analyzing, and optimizing Azure spending with tools for budgets, cost alerts, recommendations, and granular billing breakdowns across subscriptions.

services.name: Azure Service Health
services.description: Personalized dashboard and alerting service that notifies you of Azure platform issues, planned maintenance, and health advisories affecting your specific resources.

categories.name: IoT
categories.description: Services for connecting and managing IoT devices

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.description: Managed service for bidirectional communication between IoT applications and millions of devices.

services.name: Azure Digital Twins
services.description: Service for creating digital models of physical environments for monitoring, analysis, and optimization.

services.name: Azure IoT Central
services.description: Fully managed IoT SaaS platform for connecting, monitoring, and managing IoT devices at scale with built-in device management, data visualization, and rules engine.

services.name: Azure IoT Edge
services.description: Cloud-managed service for deploying cloud intelligence and analytics workloads directly onto IoT edge devices, enabling offline operation and reduced latency.

services.name: Azure Sphere
services.description: End-to-end IoT security solution combining a secured MCU hardware chip, a custom Linux-based OS, and a cloud security service to protect connected devices at the silicon level.

categories.name: Hybrid and Multicloud
categories.description: Services for managing workloads across on-premises, Azure, and other cloud providers

services.name: Azure Arc
services.description: Extend Azure services and management to any infrastructure for hybrid and multicloud consistency.

services.name: Azure Migrate
services.description: Service for assessing and migrating on-premises workloads, servers, and data to Azure.

services.name: Azure Site Recovery
services.description: Disaster recovery service for replicating and failing over workloads from primary to recovery sites.

services.name: Azure Backup
services.description: Simple, secure, and cost-effective backup solution for protecting data across on-premises and cloud.

services.name: Azure Automation
services.description: Service for automating frequent tasks and orchestrating processes across Azure and on-premises environments.

services.name: Azure VMware Solution
services.description: Runs VMware workloads natively on Azure with full VMware compatibility, enabling lift-and-shift migrations of VMware environments to Azure without re-architecting applications.

services.name: Azure Stack Hub
services.description: Hybrid cloud platform that extends Azure services to your own datacenter, enabling consistent Azure application development and deployment in disconnected or regulated environments.

services.name: Azure Stack Edge
services.description: AI-enabled edge computing appliance that brings cloud processing to your location, running Azure services and AI workloads on-premises with hardware-accelerated ML inference.

services.name: Azure Stack HCI
services.description: Hyper-converged infrastructure solution that runs virtualized Windows and Linux workloads on-premises using Azure-integrated management, billing, and monitoring.

categories.name: Containers and Registries
categories.description: Services for managing container images and running containerized workloads

services.name: Azure Container Registry
services.description: Managed Docker container registry for storing and managing container images with built-in security.

services.name: Azure Red Hat OpenShift
services.description: Managed Red Hat OpenShift service on Azure for running containerized applications at scale.

services.name: Azure Queue Storage
services.description: Simple, cost-effective cloud message queue service for storing large numbers of messages to decouple and asynchronously scale application components.

services.name: Azure Web PubSub
services.description: Fully managed real-time messaging service that uses WebSocket connections to push content updates to connected clients for web and mobile applications.

services.name: Azure Lab Services
services.description: Managed lab environment service for creating and provisioning pre-configured virtual machines for training, education, and hands-on workshops without infrastructure management.

services.name: Azure DevTest Labs
services.description: Service enabling developers and testers to quickly create environments in Azure while minimizing waste and controlling cost through policies, reusable templates, and automated shutdowns.

services.name: Azure Blueprints
services.description: Declarative governance service for composing and deploying a repeatable set of Azure resources, policies, and role assignments as a single tracked artifact.

services.name: Azure Repos
services.description: Cloud-hosted Git and TFVC version control repositories within Azure DevOps, supporting pull requests, branch policies, and code reviews for teams of any size.

services.name: Azure Pipelines
services.description: CI/CD service for automatically building, testing, and deploying code to any platform or cloud, supporting YAML pipeline definitions and integration with GitHub and Azure Repos.

services.name: Azure Boards
services.description: Agile work tracking and project management tool within Azure DevOps supporting Kanban boards, sprint planning, backlogs, and reporting for software development teams.

services.name: Azure Artifacts
services.description: Universal package management service within Azure DevOps for hosting and sharing NuGet, npm, Maven, Python, and Universal packages, with upstream source support.

services.name: Azure Test Plans
services.description: Manual and exploratory testing service within Azure DevOps for planning, executing, and tracking test cases, supporting both web and desktop apps with test evidence capture.

services.name: Azure Deployment Environments
services.description: Service enabling development teams to provision consistent, project-based application infrastructure using administrator-curated IaC templates for dev, test, and staging environments.

services.name: Azure Load Testing
services.description: Fully managed load testing service that generates high-scale traffic to identify application performance bottlenecks and validate how apps behave under peak load conditions.

services.name: Azure Chaos Studio
services.description: Managed chaos engineering service for improving application resilience by injecting controlled faults into Azure resources, services, and dependencies in real experiments.

services.name: Azure Maps
services.description: Geospatial platform providing mapping APIs, search, routing, traffic, and weather services for building location-aware web and mobile applications.

services.name: Azure Spatial Anchors
services.description: Cross-platform mixed reality service for creating spatially aware applications that persistently place, share, and find 3D content at specific real-world locations.

services.name: Azure Fluid Relay
services.description: Managed service for the Fluid Framework enabling distributed, low-latency real-time collaboration in applications — such as co-editing, live cursors, and shared state.

services.name: Azure Managed Applications
services.description: Service for building and publishing managed cloud solutions on the Azure Marketplace or a service catalog, allowing providers to maintain infrastructure while customers use the solution.

services.name: Azure Service Catalog
services.description: Organization-internal catalog of approved managed applications and templates, enabling IT teams to offer curated Azure solutions to developers while enforcing compliance.

services.name: Azure Health Data Services
services.description: Managed platform for storing, analyzing, and exchanging protected health information (PHI) at scale, supporting FHIR, DICOM, and MedTech service standards for healthcare interoperability.

services.name: GitHub Actions
services.description: CI/CD and workflow automation platform built into GitHub repositories, enabling developers to automate build, test, and deployment pipelines using YAML workflows triggered by GitHub events.

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.description: Cloud-based communications platform providing voice calling, video conferencing, chat, SMS, and email APIs for embedding real-time communication into custom applications.

services.name: Azure Media Services
services.description: Cloud-based media processing and live/on-demand streaming platform for encoding, packaging, protecting with DRM, and delivering video content at global scale.

services.name: Azure Remote Rendering
services.description: Cloud-based 3D rendering service that renders complex, high-polygon models server-side and streams the result to mixed reality devices like HoloLens 2 with low latency.

services.name: Azure Orbital
services.description: Fully managed ground station as a service for scheduling satellite contacts and downlinking data directly into Azure, eliminating the need to build and operate ground station infrastructure.

services.name: Azure Quantum
services.description: Open cloud ecosystem providing access to quantum hardware from IonQ, Quantinuum, and others alongside quantum-inspired optimization solvers and Microsoft Quantum Development Kit.
